notes: Brand positioning varies by country. A brand that is S-tier in one market may be A+ or A in another.
B-tier is baseline (0% price adjustment). All other tiers are relative to B.
Map ALL manufacturers in the country's heat pump registry.
Unmapped brands will default to C-tier with a 'brand_not_mapped' review flag.
